_comment: SCHEMA: package (string, required), severity (high|critical, required), reason (string, required), expires (YYYY-MM-DD, required), approved_by (string, required), advisory (GHSA ID or CVE, optional)
_instructions: Add entries here to bypass SCA violations until the expiry date.
Once 'expires' passes, the pipeline will FAIL again — fix the vulnerability or renew the waiver.
Waivers must be reviewed and approved before merging. Remove entries once vulnerabilities are fixed.
Run 'npm audit --json' locally to find the exact package names and advisory IDs.

reason: No upstream fix available as of 2026-04-08. Mitigated by WAF rule WA-123. Tracked in JIRA-456.
